title: FLOSS Weekly 382: OSCON Preview
summary:
Rachel Roumeliotis, a Strategic Content Director at O'Reilly Media, Inc. returns to the show to discuss OSCON with Randal. They are also joined by Scott Hanselman, a programmer and teacher.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly.
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast, and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
